      @GetExchange("/v1/catalog/services") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String, List<String>>> getCatalogServices()

    • agentCheckFail

      @PutExchange("/v1/agent/check/fail/{checkId}") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> agentCheckFail(@PathVariable String checkId, @RequestParam(required=false) String note, @RequestHeader(name="X-Consul-Token",required=false) String aclToken)

    • agentCheckPass

      @PutExchange("/v1/agent/check/pass/{checkId}") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> agentCheckPass(@PathVariable String checkId, @RequestParam(required=false) String note, @RequestHeader(name="X-Consul-Token",required=false) String aclToken)

      @PutExchange("/v1/agent/service/register") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> agentServiceRegister(@RequestHeader(name="X-Consul-Token",required=false) String aclToken, @RequestBody NewService newService)

      @DeleteExchange("/v1/kv/{context}") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteKVValues(@PathVariable String context)

    • deleteKVValues

      @DeleteExchange("/v1/kv/{context}") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteKVValues(@PathVariable String context, @RequestHeader(name="X-Consul-Token",required=false) String aclToken)

    • getKVValue

      @GetExchange("/v1/kv/{context}") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<GetValue>> getKVValue(@PathVariable String context, @RequestHeader(name="X-Consul-Token",required=false) String aclToken)

    • getKVValues

      @GetExchange("/v1/kv/{context}?recurse") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<GetValue>> getKVValues(@PathVariable String context, @RequestHeader(name="X-Consul-Token",required=false) String aclToken)

    • getKVValues

      @GetExchange("/v1/kv/{context}?recurse") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<GetValue>> getKVValues(@PathVariable String context, @RequestHeader(name="X-Consul-Token",required=false) String aclToken, @RequestParam("wait") @WaitTimeFormat Long waitTime, @RequestParam("index") long index)

    • setKVValue

      @PutExchange(url="/v1/kv/{context}", contentType="text/plain") org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Boolean> setKVValue(@PathVariable String context, @RequestBody String value)
